ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., Online Transaction, Swipe Transaction, Chip Transaction) */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant where the transaction occurred */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the merchant */,
  "mcc" INTEGER /* Merchant Category Code (MCC) */,
  "errors" TEXT /* Any errors associated with the transaction */,
  "is_fraud" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is fraudulent (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the transaction */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the transaction */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location (latitude, longitude) of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Failed) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_mcc FOREIGN KEY ("mcc") REFERENCES mcc_codes ("mcc_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the user account (e.g., Personal, Business) */,
  "security_questions" TEXT /* Security questions and answers for account recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the card (e.g., Credit, Debit) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the card (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the card */,
  "card_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the card (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "card_issuer_country" TEXT /* Country of the card issuer */,
  "card_verification_value" TEXT /* Card verification value (CVV) */,
  "card_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the card holder */,
  "card_activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the card was activated */,
  "card_status" TEXT /* Status of the card (e.g., Active, Inactive, Lost, Stolen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "merchant_city" TEXT /* City of the merchant */,
  "merchant_state" TEXT /* State of the merchant */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the merchant */,
  "mcc" INTEGER /* Merchant Category Code (MCC) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the merchant */,
  "merchant_latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the merchant location */,
  "merchant_longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the merchant location */,
  "merchant_website" TEXT /* Website of the merchant */,
  "merchant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the merchant */,
  "merchant_open_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the merchant */,
  "merchant_status" TEXT /* Status of the merchant (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Online Transaction, Swipe Transaction, Chip Transaction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction type is real-time */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction type is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mcc_codes" (
  "mcc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MCC */,
  "mcc_code" INTEGER /* Merchant Category Code (MCC) */,
  "mcc_description" TEXT /* Description of the MCC */,
  "is_fraud_sensitive" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the MCC is sensitive to fraud */,
  "average_transaction_amount" REAL /* Average transaction amount for the MCC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_transactions" (
  "fraud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud case */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction flagged as fraudulent */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the transaction as fraudulent */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the fraud review (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who reviewed the transaction */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was reviewed */,
  "flagged_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who flagged the transaction as fraudulent */,
  "flagged_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was flagged */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review process */,
  "fraud_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the likelihood of fraud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fraud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_transactions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_transactions_flagged_by FOREIGN KEY ("flagged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
